meaning: v.(使)轻轻浮起,(使)飘浮空中
examples: He has claimed he can levitate.
Nina can, apparently, levitate a small ball between her hands.
Ghosts will simply levitate over the water.
Within the passages, his Shamanistic figures stalk burning landscapes, levitate in air or float in water.
This counts for a lot, particularly when the earnings part of the price-earnings ratio starts to levitate.
